contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Hit List AU/AV formula backfill — 143 rows fixed (16 in warm-up bucket)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/65
  
  Details:
  Verified the oracle.truesight.me advisory claim that 50 of 79 'AI: Warm up prospect' stores had zero logged warm-up sends, and discovered the count was inflated by missing COUNTIFS formulas in the Hit List AU/AV columns. Patched the 143 rows that were silently uncounted.
  
  Verification (live Hit List query, sheet 1eiqZr3LW-...):
  - Confirmed 79 stores in 'AI: Warm up prospect' status
  - Confirmed AU=0 distribution at 50/79 (matching the advisory snapshot)
  - Audit of cell content (valueRenderOption=FORMULA): 525 of 668 data rows had formulas, 143 had blank cells (no formula at all). Within the 79-store warm-up bucket, 16 stores were missing formulas — being counted as zero sends regardless of actual Email Agent Follow Up history.
  
  Fix:
  - Used the existing market_research/scripts/set_hit_list_warmup_touches_formula.py:write_au_av_for_hit_list_rows() helper (introduced in TrueSightDAO/go_to_market#65) targeted at just the 143 missing rows. Single batch values_batch_update call. Did not overwrite the 525 rows that already had correct formulas.
  
  Post-fix distribution (live re-query):
  - Sheet-wide: 668/668 rows now have AU/AV formulas (was 525/668)
  - 'AI: Warm up prospect' AU=0: 50 → 37 (13 stores were false zeros — formula now reveals real send history)
  - AU=1: 3 → 4
  - AU>=2: 26 → 38
  - Sum AU across the 79 stores: 57 → 83 (+26 sends previously unaccounted)
  
  Operator-facing implication: the advisory's '50 with zero logged sends' was overstated by 13 stores. Real number is 37. Of those 37, the next breakdown question (drafts staged but not sent vs drafts never created vs sends pre-dating sync wiring) remains open.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
